title: AD Taylor-tower P11: first-class tower numerics for ODE integration, series root finding, inversion, analytic continuation
goal: Per docs/design/AD_TAYLOR_TOWER.md Frontier P11. Expose the Taylor tower as first-class user numerics through opaque series operations: taylor-coeff, taylor-eval, Taylor-series ODE integration, series-based root finding/function inversion, and analytic continuation. Reuse the same tower layout and recurrence kernel; user APIs must not expose raw tower headers. Analytic continuation may use P8 Taylor-model remainders for validated step-size/domain checks.
acceptance: ODE example y'=-y, y(0)=1 converges to exp(-t) as order/step refinement increases
root example x^2-2 converges to sqrt(2) within tolerance
series inversion examples compose back to identity through order d=8
analytic continuation rejects unsafe singularity-crossing steps unless Taylor-model validation proves enclosure
campaign_payoff: Exposes the Taylor tower as a general numerical-programming substrate, not just an internal AD representation.
